scripts.prepare:vscode-extension: npm --prefix ../vscode-extension ci && npm --prefix ../vscode-extension run compile && mkdir -p ../vscode-extension/dist && npm --prefix ../vscode-extension run package -- --out dist/beforepaste-vscode.vsix
scripts.build:linux: npm run prepare:vscode-extension && tauri build --bundles deb,rpm,appimage
scripts.build:windows: npm run prepare:vscode-extension && tauri build --bundles nsis,msi
scripts.build:macos: npm run prepare:vscode-extension && tauri build --bundles app,dmg
